work_authorization.resume_statement: Authorized to work in Canada — permanent residence approved, COPR pending.

highlights.summary: Automated monthly AVL report in VBA, reducing 1h manual task to <1min for 200 vendors across two output formats (R&D and Production/PanaCIM MES).

Built BOMinator, Excel/VBA ETL tool merging two NetSuite exports into an engineering-ready report covering recipe, manufacturers, MPNs, and alternate parts. Manages ~1,000 BOMs for 5 mechanical and electrical engineers.

Shipped contractor management app (Power Apps frontend + SharePoint backend) replacing CAD $600/month Airtable subscription, adding field-level edit control unavailable in native SharePoint. Self-taught Power Apps and Power Automate to deliver production app in one week.

Built Python/Playwright automation suite for bulk NetSuite operations (SKU creation, manufacturer updates, multi-currency pricing, translations, lead-time/MOQ fields) with Streamlit UI, handling ~10 SKUs per month with reduced transcription errors.
Built Power BI battery inventory forecasting dashboard using Power Query M, DAX measures, and seasonal averages for planning team.

Leading in-progress SharePoint architecture redesign to unify fragmented team sites across Marketing, R&D, Customer Service, Production, NetSuite ERP, the online store, and CRM. Evaluating hub-site, SharePoint Framework, and data lakehouse approaches toward a single source of truth.
Maintain data governance for component master data, BOMs, and technical documentation, validating specs, drawings, and environmental certificates (RoHS, REACH, conflict minerals) for audit readiness.
Queried, extracted, and transformed raw data from multiple databases to analyze customer interactions across sales channels and surface key product insights.
Integrated new product data into the company's transactional websites through a Product Information Management (PIM) system, ensuring consistent categorization and standardization.
Cleansed and completed missing product attributes, improving catalog data quality across the transactional websites.
Built Excel and Power BI dashboards tracking daily fuel consumption, driver performance, and route efficiency across a fleet of ~20 vehicles (cars, van, bus).
Defined KPIs, monitored monthly, and presented findings to the team and CEO, translating raw consumption data into actionable recommendations for 20 drivers.
Cleaned and analyzed operational records in Excel to support continuous improvement initiatives across the fleet.

projects.name: Taskor
projects.description: Full-stack performance tracking app. Next.js + Supabase (PostgreSQL with row-level security) + Groq/Llama 3.3 for AI-assisted task review, tied to a 15-competency annual evaluation framework with supervisor one-on-one workflow and audit-trail timer.

projects.name: School Management SQL Project
